description: cc-agent Stop hooks. (1) musician-stop.sh — the bounded loop: while a musician is active for this session it re-feeds one cycle per Stop, releasing when the musician self-closes (achieved/declined/gave-up/capped/stopped-budget), suspends (awaiting), or is cancelled. (2) nonstop-stop.sh — the OPTIONAL between-pieces layer: a no-op unless nonstop is armed (/nonstop-on); when armed and the musician has CLOSED, it blocks the stop and hands off to the cc-agent:nonstop skill to walk the roadmap milestone by milestone. The two never block on the same Stop (musician blocks on active:true, nonstop on active:false).
